name: Chicken Acapulco
recipeIngredient: 10 oz Can tomatoes and green chilies
1 Whole orange, halved and thinly sliced
recipeInstructions:
1. In a Dutch oven, sauté chicken pieces in vegetable oil until browned; remove and set aside.
2. Pour off all but 2 tablespoons of grease from the pan.
3. Add onion, garlic, and peppercorns to the pan. Remove sausage from its casing and add it to the onion mixture. Sauté for 5 to 7 minutes, then drain the grease.
4. Add chicken broth and tomatoes; bring to a simmer, uncovered, until the sauce is reduced by one-third.
5. Return the chicken to the mixture. Cover and simmer for 20 minutes.
6. Add carrots and cook for an additional 5 minutes.
7. Add zucchini, raisins, and peppers; cook for another 10 minutes or until the chicken is tender and vegetables are crisp-tender.
8. Garnish with orange slices to enhance the sweetness of the raisins.
Serves 6 to 8
Source: [Miriam B. Loo's Meal In One Favorites]
